obviates.t: v. 避免, 消除（贫困、不方便等）( obviate的第三人称单数 )
obviates.d:
v do away with
v prevent the occurrence of; prevent from happening

obviating.t: v. 避免, 消除（贫困、不方便等）( obviate的现在分词 )
obviating.d: p. pr. & vb. n. of Obviate

obviation.d: n. the act of preventing something by anticipating and disposing of it effectively

obviative.t: 另指他, 第二个他(如：“他拿他的书”中的第二个“他”)

obviosity.t: n. 显然的事物(如话语、推断等)

obvious.t: a. 明显的, 明白的, 显然的, 平淡无奇的
obvious.d: a. easily perceived by the senses or grasped by the mind
obvious.g: gk cet4 cet6 ky toefl ielts gre

obviously.t: adv. 显而易见地, 明显地
obviously.d: r. unmistakably (`plain' is often used informally for `plainly')

obviousness.t: n. 显而易见；明显；显著性
obviousness.d: n. the property of being easy to see and understand

obvolute.t: [植]跨褶的(指叶或花瓣), 卷压的, 重叠的

obvoluted.t: a. 交搭的；【植物学】(叶、瓣)跨褶的[亦作 obvoluted]
obvoluted.d:
a. Overlapping; contorted; convolute; -- applied primarily,
   in botany, to two opposite leaves, each of which has one edge
   overlapping the nearest edge of the other, and secondarily to a circle
   of several leaves or petals which thus overlap.

obwalden.t: 奥布瓦尔登州[瑞士州名](意译上瓦尔登州)
